scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.desktop:pack: node client/scripts/download-fonts.js && npm run build:client && npm run dist --workspace=desktop
scripts.desktop:pack:win: node client/scripts/download-fonts.js && npm run build:client && npm run dist:win --workspace=desktop
scripts.desktop:pack:mac: node client/scripts/download-fonts.js && npm run build:client && npm run dist:mac --workspace=desktop
